required_capability_checks.contract: T069 deterministic machine-Git, rename, conversion, patch, and apply policy
OS lock ownership and non-stealing lease semantics
Canonical containment and protected native path effects
Trusted executable resolution and bounded child-process lifecycle
CGo-free SQLite transactions, WAL, and writer fencing
Bubble Tea v2 keyboard-complete projection and bounded rendering
Owned capture, review-snapshot, proposal, and isolation roots

wsl_treatment.requirement: Run directly in the macOS environment; do not infer WSL behavior.

provisional_disposition.reason: Candidate only; T063 requires current native, workload, security, and human-approval evidence before advertisement.

native_runner.label: self-hosted-wsl
native_runner.blocked_reason: No hosted WSL runner is available; T076 requires an explicitly configured runner with Nudge, repository, Git, Codex, and all paths inside the same WSL environment.

minimum_prerequisites.name: WSL 2
minimum_prerequisites.minimum: WSL 2 distribution with Nudge, repository, Git, Codex, and paths inside the same environment
